nasb.text: The grass withers, the flower fades, When the breath of the Lord blows upon it; Surely the people are grass.

esv.text: The grass withers, the flower fades when the breath of the Lord blows on it; surely the people are grass.

cnv.text: 草必枯乾，花必凋謝； 因為耶和華的氣吹在上面； 真的，這民的確是草！

ccb.text: 耶和华吹一口气， 草就枯干，花也凋残。 人类诚然像草。

csbs.text: 草必枯干，花必凋零， 因为耶和华的气息吹在其上 ——这民真是草啊——
